title: There are some experience using MSProject with Monday (Integrations or Apps)?

posts.author: Ciri (Ciraima Velasquez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I have a client that use MSproject and We will migrate to monday, but they want to use MsProject for Plan Schedule. I would like to know if somebody here has an experience with that kind of situation

What are you trying to achieve

I need to get the main data from Msproject files and connect with Monday portfolio
